{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "application",
  "reason": "EcoStruxure Geo SCADA Expert (ClearSCADA) is purpose-built industrial control software that supervises and manages distributed field devices and sensors, functioning as an orchestration layer in industrial IoT systems; therefore the product is an active element of the IoT ecosystem. The flaw resides in the application’s authentication logic, making the affected layer the application layer.",
  "category": "scada",
  "sector": "industrial iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "device",
  "reason": "The vulnerability affects firmware of the Foscam C1 Indoor HD IP camera, which is a purpose-built IoT device that collects video data and connects to networks. The flaw resides in the device’s web management interface (firmware) and is therefore part of the device layer of the IoT ecosystem.",
  "category": "cameras",
  "sector": "consumer iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "device",
  "reason": "Honeywell Experion PKS modules are embedded industrial control devices that form an active part of an Industrial IoT control system. The buffer-overflow flaw exists in the firmware/software running on these devices, fitting the device layer definition.",
  "category": "controllers",
  "sector": "industrial iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "application",
  "reason": "Suprema BioStar 2 is a dedicated platform for managing biometric access-control devices (fingerprint/face readers). Such systems are purpose-built IoT solutions where the server software functions as the orchestration layer for connected devices. The vulnerability is in the web server of this management application, fitting the application layer definition.",
  "category": "sensors",
  "sector": "industrial iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "application",
  "reason": "Bosch IP Helper is a specialized companion application used to discover/configure Bosch IP cameras, which are IoT devices. The software is purpose-built for this IoT context and forms part of the application layer that enables user interaction with the devices. Therefore the CVE directly impacts an active element in an IoT system.",
  "category": "cameras",
  "sector": "industrial iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "application",
  "reason": "GE Proficy HMI/SCADA CIMPLICITY is supervisory control and data acquisition software that directly manages and monitors industrial devices and sensors. As an orchestration/controller element in industrial environments, it is an active component of an Industrial IoT system, fitting the IoT application-layer definition.",
  "category": "scada/hmi controller",
  "sector": "industrial iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "application",
  "reason": "The vulnerable products are Schneider Electric’s EcoStruxure Power Monitoring/SCADA software suites, purpose-built to supervise and control industrial power devices and sensors. They are integral application-layer elements within an industrial IoT system, and the flaw is in the web-application logic (URL redirection).",
  "category": "scada",
  "sector": "industrial iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "device",
  "reason": "B. Braun SpaceCom2 is a network-connected medical device used in clinical settings, i.e., a purpose-built IoT element in the healthcare domain. The flaw is in the device’s firmware (lack of cryptographic signatures), so it belongs to the device layer.",
  "category": "medical device",
  "sector": "healthcare iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",

  "category": "network infrastructure/gateway",
  "sector": "other"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",

  "category": "sensors",
  "sector": "industrial iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",

  "category": "controller/HMI",

}

{

The flaw lies in application-level logic (certificate handling), placing it in the application layer.",

  "sector": "industrial iot"
}

{

}

{

}

{
